docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - (FEE FOR SERVICE: $80.00) SERVED JUN-26-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT COCHRANE, BRENDA
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEADING PROPERTIES
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $545.00 FILED BY LEADING PROPERTIES AS TO DEFENDANT COCHRANE, BRENDA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-31-2018 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ORDER RE: DISMISSAL (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)

DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE FOR LACK OF JURISDICTION. THIS COURT LACKS JURISDICTION OVER A DEFENDANT SERVED OUT OF STATE. SEE CODE CIV. PROC. 116.340(E). PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY PATRICK BOUSHELL, PRESIDENT. DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: J. BERTELSEN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
REMARK:FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 7/29/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.
